[finish]: The module-level function `_bash_parent_repo_guard` (defined at line 178 of src/kiss/agents/sorcar/useful_tools.py) is called by the `Bash` method of the `UsefulTools` class. Specifically, at line 876, `UsefulTools.Bash` calls `guard = _bash_parent_repo_guard(command, self.work_dir)` near the start of the method, and if the guard returns a non-None message, `Bash` returns that guard message instead of executing the command.
